agg_min_max: SELECT min(totalprice) mn, max(totalprice) mx FROM orders
agg_count_distinct_multi: SELECT count(DISTINCT nationkey), count(DISTINCT mktsegment) FROM customer
agg_bool_and: SELECT bool_and(acctbal IS NOT NULL) FROM customer
agg_listagg: SELECT listagg(name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY name) FROM nation
fn_str_length: SELECT name, length(name) FROM nation ORDER BY nationkey
fn_str_upper_lower: SELECT upper(name), lower(name) FROM region ORDER BY regionkey
fn_str_substr: SELECT substr(name, 1, 3) FROM nation ORDER BY nationkey
fn_str_substring: SELECT substring(name FROM 2 FOR 2) FROM nation ORDER BY nationkey
fn_str_concat: SELECT concat(name, '-', cast(nationkey as varchar)) FROM nation ORDER BY nationkey
fn_str_concat_op: SELECT name || '_' || comment FROM region ORDER BY regionkey
fn_str_replace: SELECT replace(mktsegment, 'BUILDING', 'BLDG') FROM customer WHERE mktsegment='BUILDING' LIMIT 1
fn_str_trim: SELECT trim(' ' FROM concat(' ', name, ' ')) FROM nation ORDER BY nationkey LIMIT 5
fn_str_lpad_rpad: SELECT lpad(name, 20, '.'), rpad(name, 20, '.') FROM region ORDER BY regionkey
fn_str_reverse: SELECT reverse(name) FROM region ORDER BY regionkey
fn_str_split_part: SELECT split_part(phone, '-', 1) FROM customer ORDER BY custkey LIMIT 5
fn_str_strpos: SELECT strpos(name, 'A') FROM nation ORDER BY nationkey
fn_str_position: SELECT position('A' IN name) FROM nation ORDER BY nationkey
fn_str_starts_with: SELECT name FROM nation WHERE starts_with(name, 'A') ORDER BY nationkey
fn_pat_like: SELECT count(*) FROM customer WHERE name LIKE 'Customer#0000001%'
fn_pat_not_like: SELECT count(*) FROM part WHERE type NOT LIKE '%STEEL%'
fn_pat_regexp_like: SELECT count(*) FROM part WHERE regexp_like(name, 'red')
fn_pat_regexp_replace: SELECT regexp_replace(name, '[0-9]', '#') FROM region ORDER BY regionkey
fn_math_abs: SELECT abs(-5), abs(discount - 0.1) FROM lineitem ORDER BY orderkey, linenumber LIMIT 3
fn_math_ceil_floor: SELECT ceil(retailprice), floor(retailprice) FROM part ORDER BY partkey LIMIT 5
fn_math_round: SELECT round(retailprice, 1) FROM part ORDER BY partkey LIMIT 5
fn_math_mod: SELECT mod(size, 3) FROM part ORDER BY partkey LIMIT 5
fn_math_sqrt: SELECT round(sqrt(size),4) FROM part ORDER BY partkey LIMIT 5
fn_math_truncate: SELECT truncate(retailprice) FROM part ORDER BY partkey LIMIT 5
fn_math_greatest_least: SELECT greatest(size, 10), least(size, 10) FROM part ORDER BY partkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_year: SELECT year(orderdate) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_month: SELECT month(orderdate) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_day: SELECT day(orderdate) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_extract: SELECT extract(YEAR FROM orderdate), extract(MONTH FROM orderdate), extract(DAY FROM orderdate) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_extract_quarter: SELECT extract(QUARTER FROM orderdate) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_trunc_month: SELECT cast(date_trunc('month', orderdate) AS date) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_trunc_year: SELECT cast(date_trunc('year', orderdate) AS date) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_add: SELECT date_add('day', 7, orderdate) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_diff: SELECT date_diff('day', shipdate, receiptdate) FROM lineitem ORDER BY orderkey, linenumber LIMIT 5
fn_date_interval_add: SELECT orderdate + INTERVAL '1' DAY FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_interval_month: SELECT orderdate - INTERVAL '1' MONTH FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 5
fn_date_literal_cmp: SELECT count(*) FROM orders WHERE orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1995-12-31'
cond_case: SELECT CASE WHEN acctbal < 0 THEN 'neg' WHEN acctbal < 5000 THEN 'low' ELSE 'high' END lvl, count(*) FROM customer GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
cond_case_simple: SELECT CASE mktsegment WHEN 'BUILDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, count(*) FROM customer GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
cond_coalesce: SELECT coalesce(cast(null as varchar), name) FROM nation ORDER BY nationkey LIMIT 3
cond_nullif: SELECT nullif(discount, 0.0) FROM lineitem ORDER BY orderkey, linenumber LIMIT 5
cond_if: SELECT if(acctbal > 0, 'pos', 'nonpos') s, count(*) FROM customer GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
type_cast_decimal: SELECT cast(retailprice AS decimal(10,2)) FROM part ORDER BY partkey LIMIT 3
type_cast_varchar: SELECT cast(nationkey AS varchar) FROM nation ORDER BY nationkey LIMIT 3
type_cast_boolean: SELECT cast('true' AS boolean), cast(1 AS boolean)
type_cast_bigint: SELECT cast(retailprice AS bigint) FROM part ORDER BY partkey LIMIT 3
type_decimal_arith: SELECT cast(1 AS decimal(10,2)) / cast(3 AS decimal(10,2))
json_cast: SELECT cast(cast(42 AS json) AS varchar)
row_field_access: SELECT r.f1 FROM (SELECT cast(row(1, 'x') AS row(f1 integer, f2 varchar)) r) t
win_row_number: SELECT name, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY acctbal DESC) rn FROM customer ORDER BY rn LIMIT 10
win_rank: SELECT orderkey, totalprice, rank() OVER (ORDER BY totalprice DESC) rk FROM orders ORDER BY rk, orderkey LIMIT 10
win_dense_rank: SELECT dense_rank() OVER (ORDER BY mktsegment) dr, mktsegment FROM customer ORDER BY dr, mktsegment LIMIT 10
win_percent_rank: SELECT round(percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY size),3) pr, size FROM part ORDER BY size LIMIT 10
win_cume_dist: SELECT round(cume_dist() OVER (ORDER BY size),3), size FROM part ORDER BY size LIMIT 10
win_ntile: SELECT q, count(*) FROM (SELECT ntile(4) OVER (ORDER BY acctbal) q FROM customer) t GROUP BY q ORDER BY q
win_lag: SELECT orderkey, lag(totalprice) OVER (ORDER BY orderkey) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 10
win_lead: SELECT orderkey, lead(totalprice) OVER (ORDER BY orderkey) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 10
win_first_value: SELECT orderkey, first_value(totalprice) OVER (PARTITION BY orderstatus ORDER BY orderkey) FROM orders ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 10
win_partition_sum: SELECT orderstatus, orderkey, sum(totalprice) OVER (PARTITION BY orderstatus ORDER BY orderkey ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) FROM orders ORDER BY orderstatus, orderkey LIMIT 10
win_avg_over: SELECT nationkey, round(avg(acctbal) OVER (PARTITION BY nationkey),2) FROM customer ORDER BY nationkey LIMIT 10
win_count_over: SELECT mktsegment, count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY mktsegment) FROM customer ORDER BY mktsegment LIMIT 5
join_inner: SELECT c.mktsegment, count(*) FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.custkey=o.custkey GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
join_left: SELECT count(*) FROM customer c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.custkey=o.custkey
join_right: SELECT count(*) FROM orders o RIGHT JOIN customer c ON c.custkey=o.custkey
join_full: SELECT count(*) FROM customer c FULL OUTER JOIN orders o ON c.custkey=o.custkey
join_cross: SELECT count(*) FROM nation n CROSS JOIN region r
join_self: SELECT count(*) FROM nation a JOIN nation b ON a.regionkey=b.regionkey AND a.nationkey<b.nationkey
join_three_way: SELECT r.name, count(*) FROM region r JOIN nation n ON r.regionkey=n.regionkey JOIN customer c ON c.nationkey=n.nationkey GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY r.name
join_using: SELECT count(*) FROM orders JOIN customer USING (custkey)
setop_union_all: SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT nationkey FROM nation UNION ALL SELECT regionkey FROM region) t
setop_union: SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT regionkey FROM nation UNION SELECT regionkey FROM region) t
setop_intersect: SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT nationkey FROM nation INTERSECT SELECT regionkey FROM region) t
setop_except: SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT nationkey FROM nation EXCEPT SELECT regionkey FROM region) t
subq_scalar: SELECT count(*) FROM orders WHERE totalprice > (SELECT avg(totalprice) FROM orders)
subq_in: SELECT count(*) FROM orders WHERE custkey IN (SELECT custkey FROM customer WHERE mktsegment='AUTOMOBILE')
subq_not_in: SELECT count(*) FROM customer WHERE nationkey NOT IN (SELECT regionkey FROM region)
subq_exists: SELECT count(*) FROM customer c WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.custkey=c.custkey)
subq_not_exists: SELECT count(*) FROM customer c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.custkey=c.custkey)
subq_from: SELECT avg(cnt) FROM (SELECT custkey, count(*) cnt FROM orders GROUP BY custkey) t
subq_with_cte: WITH seg AS (SELECT mktsegment, count(*) c FROM customer GROUP BY mktsegment) SELECT mktsegment FROM seg WHERE c > 0 ORDER BY mktsegment
group_rollup: SELECT orderstatus, count(*) FROM orders GROUP BY ROLLUP(orderstatus) ORDER BY 1
group_cube: SELECT returnflag, linestatus, count(*) FROM lineitem GROUP BY CUBE(returnflag, linestatus) ORDER BY 1,2
group_grouping_sets: SELECT returnflag, linestatus, count(*) FROM lineitem GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((returnflag),(linestatus),()) ORDER BY 1,2
group_having: SELECT orderkey, count(*) c FROM lineitem GROUP BY orderkey HAVING count(*) >= 5 ORDER BY orderkey LIMIT 15
group_multi: SELECT returnflag, linestatus, round(sum(quantity),2) FROM lineitem GROUP BY returnflag, linestatus ORDER BY 1,2
group_distinct: SELECT DISTINCT orderstatus FROM orders ORDER BY 1
order_nulls_last: SELECT nullif(acctbal, acctbal) v FROM customer ORDER BY v ASC NULLS LAST, custkey LIMIT 3
order_desc_limit: SELECT name, acctbal FROM customer ORDER BY acctbal DESC, custkey LIMIT 5
order_offset: SELECT custkey FROM customer ORDER BY custkey OFFSET 5 LIMIT 5
order_fetch_first: SELECT custkey FROM customer ORDER BY custkey FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
misc_between: SELECT count(*) FROM part WHERE size BETWEEN 10 AND 20
misc_in_list: SELECT count(*) FROM orders WHERE orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH')
misc_is_null: SELECT count(*) FROM customer WHERE comment IS NOT NULL
misc_arithmetic: SELECT round(sum(extendedprice * (1 - discount) * (1 + tax)),2) FROM lineitem WHERE shipdate < DATE '1994-01-01'
misc_cast_in_group: SELECT cast(acctbal AS integer) / 1000 bucket, count(*) FROM customer GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 10
q1_pricing_summary: SELECT returnflag,linestatus,sum(quantity) sq,sum(extendedprice) sp,count(*) c FROM lineitem WHERE shipdate<=DATE '1998-09-02' GROUP BY returnflag,linestatus ORDER BY returnflag,linestatus
q6_revenue: SELECT round(sum(extendedprice*discount),2) rev FROM lineitem WHERE shipdate>=DATE '1994-01-01' AND shipdate<DATE '1995-01-01' AND discount BETWEEN 0.05 AND 0.07 AND quantity<24
q3_shipping: SELECT o.orderkey,round(sum(l.extendedprice*(1-l.discount)),2) rev,o.orderdate FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.custkey=o.custkey JOIN lineitem l ON l.orderkey=o.orderkey WHERE c.mktsegment='BUILDING' AND o.orderdate<DATE '1995-03-15' AND l.shipdate>DATE '1995-03-15' GROUP BY o.orderkey,o.orderdate ORDER BY rev DESC,o.orderdate LIMIT 10
q5_nation_revenue: SELECT n.name,round(sum(l.extendedprice*(1-l.discount)),2) rev FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.custkey=o.custkey JOIN lineitem l ON l.orderkey=o.orderkey JOIN supplier s ON l.suppkey=s.suppkey AND c.nationkey=s.nationkey JOIN nation n ON s.nationkey=n.nationkey JOIN region r ON n.regionkey=r.regionkey WHERE r.name='ASIA' AND o.orderdate>=DATE '1994-01-01' AND o.orderdate<DATE '1995-01-01' GROUP BY n.name ORDER BY rev DESC
q10_returns: SELECT c.name,round(sum(l.extendedprice*(1-l.discount)),2) rev,n.name FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.custkey=o.custkey JOIN lineitem l ON l.orderkey=o.orderkey JOIN nation n ON c.nationkey=n.nationkey WHERE o.orderdate>=DATE '1993-10-01' AND o.orderdate<DATE '1994-01-01' AND l.returnflag='R' GROUP BY c.name,n.name ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 20
